injuries.comment: The Senators said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Eller Eller isn't available for the start of training camp after undergoing a minor abdominal surgery and no timetable was provided, per Julian McKenzie of The Athletic.

The Senators said on Wednesday that Jensen should resume skating next week, but there's no guarantee he'll be ready for Ottawa's season opener versus Tampa Bay on Thursday (Oct. 9), per Bruce Garrioch of Postmedia.
